untranslatable_reason: Flag pattern detection requires geometric trendline analysis (parallel lines, breakout confirmation, flag dimensioning: short/narrow/tall/wide classification) which cannot be expressed using only price-based technical indicators and comparison operators. The signal requires pattern recognition capabilities beyond the scope of simple indicator thresholds. Donchian channels used as proxy for breakout detection, but cannot capture the specific flag morphology and dimension classifications (short_and_narrow, short_and_wide, tall_and_wide) described in the source material.
translation_notes: This signal describes a technical chart pattern requiring visual/geometric analysis. Used Donchian channels as a mechanical approximation for breakout detection on both sides. Performance metrics are conditional on flag dimensions which cannot be computed from standard indicators. Author does not specify exit conditions (AUTHOR_SILENT), so a mean-reversion exit via channel midline was substituted. Formation length ~10 days mapped to hold_days_max. Recommend implementing custom pattern detector for full signal fidelity.
